race.comment: MISS TALLCHIEF (10) has been racing at Caulfield Heath in stronger and two back finished within range. Loves this course/trip and has a key gear switch. With a 2kg claim and back home, she's well placed to win. DARTS DALY (2) is fourth up and should be ready to show more like his best. He finds easier and maps well. The tongue tie is on again, and Meech is a positive jockey engagement. CRICKWOOD (8) resumed here with an easy Maiden win and impressed after settling at the back of the field. She'd looked good at the jumpouts and can play a leading role, fitter, and with John Allen sticking aboard. DAMAS (3) draws wide but is going well. Has been kept up to the mark with a winning jumpout and deserves another crack over 1200m.
